title: Amtech F1110 5 Piece 6.25mm (1/4") Titanium coated high speed steel (HSS) drill bit set
features: DURABLE: These 6.25mm (1/4") shank high speed steel (HSS) drill bits are heat treated and have a titanium nitride coating for excellent cutting performance
VERSATILE: The set includes sizes: 1.5mm, 2.5mm, 3.2mm, 4mm and 4.8mm and can be used with most popular power tools
SIZE CAPACITY: 4 inch range ideal for household and trade applications
PRECISION PERFORMANCE: Provides smooth and accurate results
DIY & TRADE USE: Reliable choice for both professionals and home projects
description: Product Description Am-Tech DIY and Tool products come with a twelve month guarantee and are built for the rigors of the typical English home owner and the DIY jobs expected. The range includes a comprehensive range of hand tools for every job. Am-Tech also offer a range of power tools that not only provide a reliable level of service, but also look great as a present or gift in colour boxes and double blister displays. Am-Tech also offers a range of innovatively designed security products ranging from Dummy cameras to siren sounding locks. Am-Tech produces their products from the best materials possible and at the best cost to ensure you are getting a real value for money offering. Safety Warning No Box Contains 1 x 5Pc 1/4" Titanium Drill Bit Set See more
